items.title: Rozier continues to seek a job with an NBA team. His current bond terms would prevent that because of how NBA views them, his lawyer said, with ex-teammates now on 4 different teams. He's unable to play against or practice with them, per his bond terms. Judge denied the request.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: Rozier continues to seek a job with an NBA team. His current bond terms would prevent that because of how NBA views them, his lawyer said, with ex-teammates now on 4 different teams. He's unable to play against or practice with them, per his bond terms. Judge denied the request.

items.title: Spicy day in Brooklyn federal court as Terry Rozier made his latest appearance. A federal judge denied his request to remove certain ex-Hornets players + coaches from no contact list. Rozier's new lawyer has asked judge to move the case to South Florida. Trial date still Feb. 8.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: Spicy day in Brooklyn federal court as Terry Rozier made his latest appearance. A federal judge denied his request to remove certain ex-Hornets players + coaches from no contact list. Rozier's new lawyer has asked judge to move the case to South Florida. Trial date still Feb. 8.

items.title: JUST IN: The Denver Nuggets are waiving center Jonas Valanciunas, league sources told HoppsHype. He had a fully guaranteed $10 million decision today. Denver will now owe Valanciunas $2 million for the 2026-27 season. He’s averaged 12.8 points and 9.0 rebounds in 14 NBA seasons.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: JUST IN: The Denver Nuggets are waiving center Jonas Valanciunas, league sources told HoppsHype. He had a fully guaranteed $10 million decision today. Denver will now owe Valanciunas $2 million for the 2026-27 season. He’s averaged 12.8 points and 9.0 rebounds in 14 NBA seasons.

items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
* The Knicks went 4-0 in elimination/closeout games in the 2026 playoffs 

* They won all 4 closeout contests on the road.

* New York outscored their opponents by 122 points in those four contests. 

* That’s an average margin of victory of 30.5 points per game.

AVERAGE

That really happened.

items.title: Spilled too much ink on the next steps for the Pacers here. More concise: They can't fit in Nance under the first apron without either A) signing him to an Exhibit 10 deal or B) waiving either Micah Potter or Quenton Jackson. Looking for the clarity.
